== Notes for [[Item:Q83420|Q83420]] ==

He and his brother, [http://www.geni.com/people/Rabeea-bin-al-Haarith/6000000015278510058/ Rabeea' bin al-Haarith] were one among those 8 persons who did not flee in the '''Battle of Hunayn'''.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abu_Sufyan_ibn_al-Harith

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3142309CE1EFBC189822EF79916C87D6
geni:6000000013345197158

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
